creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On Sat, Jun 17, 2000 at 12:39:05AM +0200, Gerald Pfeifer wrote:
 > (I do not have much experience yet with FreeBSD development, but isn't it
 > considered proper etiquette to inform a maintainer if you make changes to
 > his port?)
 
 Not for simple changes like this.  If we notified every maintainer
 whenever we did small changes like that, we'd get flamed for "spamming"
 their mailboxes.  What a catch-22, eh?  :-\
 
 -- 
 Will Andrews <andrewsw@purdue.edu> <will@FreeBSD.org>
